mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_KEYS(ANNOTATION_JSON) AS outerKey FROM mutation;

SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ANNOTATION_JSON, CONCAT('$.', #{outerKey}, '.', #{innerKey}))) AS value, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ANNOTATION_JSON, CONCAT('$.', #{outerKey}, '.', #{innerKey}))) AS #{innerKey}, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mutation GROUP BY value;
